name: TCPingInfoView
short_description: Test for TCP connections. Monitor your game servers or other Internet services based on TCP.
detailed_description:
TCPingInfoView can test TCP connections on Windows. The main purpose is to monitor your game servers or other Internet services based on TCP.

It supports Win7 and high DPI, but it is recommended to run on Windows 10 1703 or later.

It's also open source, so anyone can study, modify, and contribute to making it better.

Example of the List

# Google
[2607:f8b0:4007:801::2004]:443 IPv6
172.217.14.68:80
Google, port 443

# Youtube
[2607:f8b0:4007:80e::200e] IPv6
172.217.14.78 IPv4 地址
YouTube port 80
